probe_results.response:
# Revised Optimization Framework: Quality + Engagement Time

## Recalibrated Approach (90% Quality / 10% Engagement)

**Initial Reaction**: This creates an interesting tension. As a trader, I'm **highly skeptical** of engagement time as a metric - it can directly conflict with profitability.

### The Core Conflict

**Quality (90%)**: Get the insight, execute, move on
**Engagement Time (10%)**: Stay longer, read more, click through
